productDisplayName: Puma Men Long Logo Black Bermuda
description: Composition Black long bermuda made of 100% polyester, with a broad, elasticated waistband, drawstrings woven through loops, two insert pockets, printed branding on the right leg and embroidered branding below the left pocket Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with lukewarm water Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron; Do not iron on decorations Soft on the inside and sporty on the outside, this pair of bermudas from puma make a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Crafted from polyester, these pants are ideal for family picnics or just laid back weekends. The soft blended fabric keeps you dry and comfortable and the smart branding does wonders for your casual style. Pair this with a T-shirt and sneakers or flip flops. Model statistics Model is a size M of height 6' and waist 28"
